title: Jamaican Ackee Stir Fry
description: A Caribbean-inspired stir fry made with ackee, onions, and spices. Serve with steamed rice or roti for a delicious and easy meal.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add onion and sweet pepper and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add ackee, stir-fry sauce, and jamaican seasoning. Stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until ackee is heated through.
Transfer to a serving platter and garnish with chopped cilantro.
Serve immediately with steamed rice or roti.
